info.description: A Boonma Farm application with Fiber, GORM, and Dependency Injection
info.title: Boonma Farm API

post.description: Login user with provided credentials and return JWT token. Token is also set as HTTP-only cookie.
Logout user and clear the authentication cookie
Register a new user with the provided details

put.description: Update details of a client. Super admin can update any client, others can only update their own client.

post.description: Add a new client with the provided details. Only super admin can create clients.

get.description: Returns a list of clients with id and name for dropdown/select. Only super admin can access.
Retrieve a client by its ID. Super admin can access any client, others can only access their own client.
Retrieve a list of farms associated with the current client

post.description: Add a new farm entry with the provided details. Super admin only.

get.description: Retrieve all farms for the client with their nested ponds (for Existing Data view). Super admin may pass clientId query param.
Retrieve details of a specific farm by its ID

put.description: Update details of a farm entry. Super admin only. Id in path; body contains name.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of feed collections for the current client
get.summary: Get a list of feed collections with pagination

put.description: Update an existing feed collection with new details

post.description: Add a new feed collection with the provided details

get.description: Retrieve a feed collection by its ID
get.summary: Get a feed collection by ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all merchants

put.description: Update an existing merchant with new details

post.description: Create a new merchant with the provided details

get.description: Retrieve a merchant by its ID
Retrieve a list of ponds belonging to a specific farm
get.summary: Get a list of ponds by farm ID

post.description: Create multiple ponds for a farm. Request: farmId, array of names. New ponds have status maintenance.

get.description: Retrieve a pond by its ID

put.description: Update an existing pond. Id in path; body contains optional farmId, name, status.

parameters.description: Updated pond data (farmId, name, status optional)
parameters.name: body

delete.description: Delete a pond by its ID

post.description: Record a fill activity for a pond. If the pond has no active cycle, creates one. Request: fishType, amount, activityDate; optional fishWeight, fishUnit, pricePerUnit.
Validate and compute fill summary (costs, stock impact) without persisting. For Review & Confirm flow.
Transfer fish from this pond to another. If destination is in maintenance, backend creates active_pond for it.
Validate and compute transfer summary (costs, stock impact) without persisting. For Review & Confirm flow.

parameters.description: toPondId, fishType, amount, activityDate, pricePerUnit, additionalCosts
parameters.name: body

post.description: Record a sell activity. If markToClose is true, close the active cycle and set pond to maintenance.
Validate and compute sell summary (revenue, items, stock impact) without persisting. For Review & Confirm flow.

get.description: Retrieve the user details of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Update the details of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Create a new user with the provided details. For system setup, this endpoint is public and allows creating users without authentication. When authenticated, uses JWT context for creator and clientId.

get.description: Retrieve a list of users associated with the current client ID
Retrieve a paginated list of workers for the current client
get.summary: Get a list of workers with pagination

put.description: Update an existing worker with new details

post.description: Add a new worker with the provided details

get.description: Retrieve a worker by its ID

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

CookieAuth.description: JWT token stored in HTTP-only cookie (automatically sent by browser)
CookieAuth.name: jwt_token
